title: Integrate AI Memory Watcher into System Startup
why: User requested that the change-detector automation script runs automatically on system boot so that AI context is continuously hydrated in the background.
root_cause: User requested that the change-detector automation script runs automatically on system boot so that AI context is continuously hydrated in the background.
solution: Added Step 7 to startup.bat to automatically launch 'npm run watch' in app/ai/automation, and updated all step counters to [x/7].
